judge_reason: Both descriptions agree there is a hand-drawn diagram with two perspectives, but B adds many specific labels ('Side View', 'View from Above', 'Mt Charleston', 'My Position', etc.) that A does not mention, without contradiction.
original_image_tags: A hand-drawn diagram on a dark background showing two perspectives of a flight path.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned archival page with typed report text under a large “RESTRICTED” stamp, plus two hand-drawn chalk-style diagrams of a flight path/trail labeled “Side View” and “View from Above,” with annotations including “Mt Charleston,” “my position,” “5 miles,” and a compass cross marked E, S, W, N.*
